label: The Registry Stockroom
description: The Registry Stockroom occupies a low, brick-vaulted chamber behind the licensed counter, its door clad in iron strapwork and stamped with Varric Holdfast registry impressions. Racked shelves and numbered pegs hold bundled staves, sealed oil tins, and spare fittings, with waxed tags and corded custody slips fixed to each lot for audit. A chalked tally wall and a narrow weighing bench formalize intake and issue under the shop’s traceability codes. Hazard placards and sand buckets line the threshold, reflecting the Holdfast’s interdiction discipline even in routine storage.
